overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person walk through a medieval stone archway from a flower garden into a bustling castle courtyard. The scene features high-quality rendering with soft morning light, historic stone architecture, and NPC characters in period clothing.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a lush enclosed garden with dense vegetation and white flowers lining a cobblestone path. The camera walks steadily toward an ornate stone archway ahead, with a historic stone building visible to the left. An NPC briefly passes by the left edge of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed garden to an open courtyard. The archway walls are covered in green ivy. Through the arch, distant castle buildings, mountains, and a fountain become visible, with NPCs walking in the courtyard ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard with fountain, benches, and distant mountain views

well-manicured green grass areas between the cobblestone paths

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide open castle courtyard bathed in morning light. The space features cobblestone paths, grass lawns, wooden benches, and a central fountain. NPCs in period clothing walk along the paths or sit on benches, while red banners and castle buildings stand against a backdrop of misty mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, lush garden into the expansive openness of a bustling castle courtyard. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with dense vegetation and white flowers, moving steadily toward an ornate stone archway as a figure passes by the periphery. As the camera glides through the ivy-covered arch, the enclosed greenery gives way to a wide vista of distant castle spires and misty mountains. The scene then opens fully into the sun-drenched courtyard, where the perspective expands to reveal a central fountain, wooden benches, and red banners fluttering in the morning light. Finally, the camera settles into the heart of the plaza, surrounded by NPCs in period clothing strolling across the grass lawns and stone walkways.
